title: Rivian Automotive Achieves Positive Gross Profit Milestone
text: Rivian Automotive reached its first full year of positive gross profit on $5.387 billion in annual revenue, marking a significant milestone for the EV manufacturer. While the company achieved this gross profit milestone, it still reported a full-year net loss of $3.646 billion. The fourth quarter alone saw revenue decline to $1.286 billion from $1.734 billion year-over-year, with a quarterly net loss of $811 million. The milestone announcement contributed to Rivian's stock rising 11.6% following the earnings report. Management emphasized upcoming initiatives including the R2 mid-size SUV launch and progress with its Volkswagen technology joint venture, which is expected to provide over $2 billion in funding during 2026.
